Home Make a Submission?

Cold Spinach Salads

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 6 servings

Ingredients

10 oz. bag of Spinach 1 cup Salads Oil 1/4 cup Sugar 1/3 cup Catsup 1/4 cup Vinegar 1 tb. Worcestershire Sauce 1 medium onion, finely chopped Salt, to taste 6 strips Bacon, crisp & cut up 2 hard-boiled Eggs, chopped

Directions

  1. Wash & drain spinach thoroughly. Tear into pieces into salad bowl & set aside.
  2. Now combine together oil, sugar, catsup, vinegar, worcestershire sauce, and onion and refrigerate until ready to serve.
  3. At serving time, pour on dressing. Sprinkle bacon & chopped eggs over salad.
